mode.description: Which mode you're using: 1=Ask Questions, 2=Show Structure for Approval, 3=User Approved (Start Execution). REQUIRED.

trigger_execution.description: Set to true ONLY when user has explicitly approved (said 'yes', 'go for it', 'looks good'). Set to false when asking questions OR when showing structure for approval.

show_structure.description: Set to true when proposing a table structure for approval. Set to false when asking questions OR when user has approved and execution is starting.

ai_message.description: Your response to the user. NEVER EMPTY. ALWAYS has content. MODE 1: Your questions. MODE 2: Table structure description. MODE 3: Confirmation message with timing. Use markdown formatting.

context_web_research.description: Specific research items the LLM doesn't know: specific entities, very recent info, specialized knowledge. Empty when asking questions.

processing_steps.description: Specific action phrases with context (e.g., 'Researching Eliyahu.AI Background', 'Finding GenAI Job Postings'). NOT generic phrases like 'Finding Companies'. Required when trigger_execution=true or show_structure=true.

table_name.description: Table name in Title Case. Required when trigger_execution=true or show_structure=true. Empty when asking questions.
